SEARCH
Package com.surrealdb

Class AuthDetailKind

java.lang.Object
com.surrealdb.AuthDetailKind
public final class AuthDetailKind extends Object
Detail kind constants for authentication errors.

These appear nested inside NotAllowedDetailKind.AUTH details.

See Also:
